name: com.maddr.citygen-core
description: Engine-agnostic logic core for the City Battlefields track (docs/18): hex grid index (1 hex = 20 m), Ring/Range radius queries, and the Front/Flank/Rear attack-arc model (docs/04 posMod). Pure C#, zero UnityEngine reference; also built and tested standalone via dotnet (see Tests~, hidden from Unity's importer by the ~ suffix).
